query:
SELECT dataOrigin, COUNT(*) as total FROM clients WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY dataOrigin;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_activos FROM clients WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT dataOrigin, COUNT(*) as total FROM clients WHERE deletedAt IS NULL GROUP BY dataOrigin;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_activos FROM clients WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
